title: 无标题文章

content:
if you work at a slightly larger company and you're not already playing with open models, building a sense for when to reach for which, you're going to have a lot of catching up to do soon...

3-4 times now I've liked GLM 5.2's answer more than 5.5 xhigh or Opus 4.8.

bonkers! even if the bar were just 80% as good as the leading models, the cost alone makes open models an easy call, especially as they build out their loops. approaching better results?

the tide, 'tis a-shifting, friends...
